subject: Dreaming of an even, golden tan? | Greatlife.eu 💚
body:
[Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu)

sun-kissed skin ☀️

 

Dreaming of an even, golden tan that lasts longer?

Many of us long for that natural, sun-kissed glow that makes the skin look healthy and vibrant. Did you know you can support the skin’s natural pigmentation even before the sun appears? By starting Tan Plus+ in good time, you can help your skin build a more even tone and create better conditions for a beautiful summer tan.

[Discover Tan Plus+ →](https://www.greatlife.eu/tan-plus-greatlife)

 

 

[Living Silica](https://www.greatlife.eu/tan-plus-greatlife)

 

Tan Plus+ for beautiful sun-kissed skin

 
Contains a powerful combination of beta-carotene, turmeric, green tea extract, and copper, which help protect the skin against oxidative stress and support an even, natural tan.
By using Tan Plus+ regularly well before summer, you give your skin the best possible conditions for a natural and even sun-kissed glow.

[Buy Tan Plus+](https://www.greatlife.eu/tan-plus-greatlife)

 

What is beta-carotene?
Beta-carotene is a natural pigment found in colorful fruits and vegetables such as carrots and sweet potatoes. In the body, it is converted into vitamin A, which helps maintain normal skin.

Beta-carotene is also stored in the skin and may give a light golden tone, while also acting as protection against oxidative stress that can occur with sun exposure.
 
Start early for best results
For the best effect, it’s important to start in good time. Skin development and pigmentation occur gradually, and it can take several weeks to build up beta-carotene levels in the body.

By starting now, you can:
Prepare your skin for summer
Achieve a more even and longer-lasting tan
Support your skin from within

[Discover Tan Plus+ →](https://www.greatlife.eu/tan-plus-greatlife)
